title: [Frontend] Profile activity: bigger images, delete post button, comment likes UI
[Infra] Token optimization — archive tasks, on-demand agent docs, trim CLAUDE.md
description:
## HIGH — Reduce Claude Code token usage by ~66% per session

### What's wrong
Every session loads ~87KB of context files (CLAUDE.md, tasks.json, agent docs, MEMORY.md). The biggest offender is tasks.json at 268KB with 79 completed tasks that are never needed. Agent docs (28KB) are loaded every session but only used on specific trigger phrases.

### What to build

**1. Archive done tasks**

Create `claude-agents/tasks-archive.json` and move all tasks with `status: "done"` from `tasks.json` into it. Keep only active tasks (todo/in_progress) in `tasks.json`.

Script approach:


**Savings: ~50,000 tokens/session**

**2. Move agent docs to on-demand folder**

Create `claude-agents/on-demand/` directory. Move:
- `claude-agents/ui-ux-auditor-agent.md` → `claude-agents/on-demand/ui-ux-auditor-agent.md`
- `claude-agents/bug-triage-agent.md` → `claude-agents/on-demand/bug-triage-agent.md`

Update CLAUDE.md UI/UX Auditor section (line ~55) to:
> When triggered, read `claude-agents/on-demand/ui-ux-auditor-agent.md`

Update CLAUDE.md Bug Triage section (line ~63) to:
> When triggered, read `claude-agents/on-demand/bug-triage-agent.md`

**Savings: ~5,000 tokens/session**

**3. Extract Pattern Reference Card from CLAUDE.md**

Move the "Pattern Reference Card" section (component template, query hook template, API module template, backend endpoint checklist) from CLAUDE.md into a new file `CLAUDE-TEMPLATES.md`.

Replace the section in CLAUDE.md with:
> **Pattern Reference Card:** See `CLAUDE-TEMPLATES.md` for component, hook, API module, and route templates.

**Savings: ~1,200 tokens/session**

**4. Clean MEMORY.md**

Edit `/Users/pratham/.claude/projects/-Users-pratham-Desktop-personal-CookQuest/memory/MEMORY.md`:
- Remove "Slash Commands" section (duplicate of CLAUDE.md table)
- Remove "CLAUDE.md Agent Self-Bootstrap Sections" (meta-reference to CLAUDE.md)
- Remove "Cleanup" section (historical, outdated)
- Update "Task Queue" section to say: "Task queue: `claude-agents/tasks.json` (active only). Archive: `claude-agents/tasks-archive.json`."

**Savings: ~350 tokens/session**

**5. Shrink claude-agents/README.md**

Reduce from 213 lines to ~20 lines. Current content is redundant with CLAUDE.md pipeline sections. Keep only:
- One-sentence project description
- Link to CLAUDE.md for full instructions
- File listing of claude-agents/ directory

**Savings: ~1,500 tokens/session**

### Subtasks
1. Archive done tasks from tasks.json → tasks-archive.json
2. Create claude-agents/on-demand/ and move agent docs
3. Update CLAUDE.md references for moved agent docs
4. Extract Pattern Reference Card to CLAUDE-TEMPLATES.md
5. Clean MEMORY.md
6. Shrink claude-agents/README.md
7. Run `npm run build` to verify no breakage

### Depends on
none

### Acceptance criteria
- Given tasks.json, then it contains only active tasks (< 15KB)
- Given tasks-archive.json, then it contains all previously done tasks
- Given a new session, CLAUDE.md does NOT include Pattern Reference Card templates
- Given `/ui-audit` trigger, agent can read `claude-agents/on-demand/ui-ux-auditor-agent.md`
- Given MEMORY.md, no duplicate sections with CLAUDE.md exist
- Given `npm run build`, then it succeeds

### Files to create/modify
- `claude-agents/tasks.json` — remove done tasks
- CREATE `claude-agents/tasks-archive.json` — archived done tasks
- MOVE `claude-agents/ui-ux-auditor-agent.md` → `claude-agents/on-demand/`
- MOVE `claude-agents/bug-triage-agent.md` → `claude-agents/on-demand/`
- `CLAUDE.md` — update references, extract templates
- CREATE `CLAUDE-TEMPLATES.md` — extracted templates
- `MEMORY.md` — clean redundant sections
- `claude-agents/README.md` — shrink

title: [Backend] Post likes + notifications — tables, endpoints, triggers
[Frontend] Post like button on feed cards + types + hooks
[Frontend] Notification bell in TopNav + dropdown panel
[Frontend] Notifications page (/notifications)
